## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Promptfoo and GrowthX to discuss content production and quality improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality and relevance need significant improvement; focus on LLM security, not ML/AI broadly](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Articles must be concise (max 5 pages), use recent examples (2023+), and target LLM application security professionals](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [GrowthX to revise approach, provide one sample article by Monday for review before proceeding further](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and Audience Alignment

  - [Current content not meeting Promptfoo's quality standards or time-saving goals](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Articles too long (20+ pages) and often misaligned with target audience (LLM application security professionals)](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Need to focus on practical security implementations for deployed/staging LLMs, not ML research or training](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Content Revision Strategy

  - [Reduce article length to max 5 pages or \~1500 words (SEO sweet spot)](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Use only 2023+ examples, incidents, and research](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Structure: Problem statement, industry definition, causes, remediation tactics, Promptfoo's role](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Utilize OWASP Top 10 as a reference for risk definitions and examples](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

### Production Process Adjustments

  - [GrowthX switched to AI-generated content with human review](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Need to enhance human editing to avoid obvious AI-generated text (audience are LLM experts)](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Halt new content production until quality issues are resolved](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### Airtable Clean-up and Workflow

  - [Cleaned up Airtable, removing duplicates and irrelevant content](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Updated statuses for better workflow tracking (e.g., scheduled, creating article, review)](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Currently working on 6 pieces (3 new, 3 rewrites)](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review and revise one article based on feedback, submit to Promptfoo by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Promptfoo to review sample article and provide additional feedback](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Once article format is approved, GrowthX to apply new standards to all existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Reassess partnership effectiveness after implementing changes](https://fathom.video/share/pNEFaTYV1ar5-Xboiy77JCaibzeY654w?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
